evidence: SKILL.md line 33: asks 'What questions do you have about this data?' — descriptive, not decision-driven
SKILL.md line 55: proposes techniques based on data shape, not hypotheses

gaps: Missing: Wizard does not ask 'What decision will this analysis inform?'

Missing: Summary does not reconnect findings to original business decision
metrics.recommendation: Add a 4th Wizard question: 'What business decision depends on this analysis?' Add Blue Hat causal hypothesis section: 'Based on playbook context, I propose testing these hypotheses: [H1], [H2]'. Add Summary reconnection: 'Does the data support your initial hypothesis?'

evidence: SKILL.md lines 298-303: Green Hat lists alternatives generically without structured novelty-seeking

evidence: Each phase has explicit Purpose statement

metrics.recommendation: Add Black Hat 'Sample Size Assessment': compute N per group, flag N<30 as suggestive only. Add Yellow Hat instruction to include N per group in all GROUP BY results. Require hedging in ASSUME when N is small.

summary: Baseline score 18/36. Only context-boundary passes (3/3). Critical gaps: direction-quality, insight-novelty, uncertainty, segmentation, actionability, narrative, and success-metrics all score 1/3. Need improvements in causal framing, uncertainty quantification, multi-dimensional segmentation, actionable recommendations, narrative arc, and success metric validation.
